name: Corn Fritters
recipeIngredient: 4 large ears shucked fresh corn, kernels cut from cob
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, baking soda, salt, and pepper.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the egg yolk, corn kernels, melted butter, nutmeg (if using), and buttermilk.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just moistened.
4. Heat about 1/4 cup vegetable oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
5. Using a spoon or spatula, scoop dollops of the batter into the hot oil.
6. Flatten the fritters with the spatula.
7. Fry the fritters for 1-2 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove the fritters to paper towels to drain excess oil.
9. Serve warm.
